chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 55 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of MA 748/2024. 18.11.2025. M/s Muhammad Sulleman Unar and Asad Ali Jatoi, Advocates for applicant. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Channa, Advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G for State. = For reasons to be recorded, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed. JUDGE Tufail
